---
name: scrum-verify
description: "Scrum Workflow: Verify story implementation against its specification and acceptance criteria. Use when the user says 'verify story', 'verify implementation', or '/scrum-verify'."
---

Load and execute the framework command at `scrum_workflow/commands/verify.md`.

The command file contains the full workflow orchestration including:
- Verify implementation against specification
- Check acceptance criteria compliance
- Validate generated artifacts
- Generate verification report
